query: Let's design a test plan for this epic — I want a risk-based test strategy with priorities and levels mapped to the requirements before we start building.
I want to create a test strategy for the funds-transfer epic: assess the risks, decide what to test at unit vs API vs E2E, and set coverage priorities.
Before development starts, do a testability review of this architecture and produce a per-epic test design with a risk assessment matrix.
We've already written and run the tests — build a requirements-to-tests traceability matrix and tell me whether the quality gate is PASS or FAIL.
Let's write red-phase acceptance tests for this story so we can do ATDD before the feature is implemented.
The feature is implemented but under-tested — expand the automated test coverage and fill the gaps following our existing test patterns.
